schema_roundtrip.evidence: slow-variable learner state survives agent snapshot round-trip and runtime trace emission

signature_a.slow_summary: Threat sensitivity changed through repeated experience. Continuity resilience remained stable because sleep-cycle drift budget exhausted.

pressures.rationale: repeated unresolved threat accumulated across recent sleep evidence
threat-signalling episodes recurred across prediction and replay surfaces
exploration was updated by repeated evidence rather than one-step novelty
survival-protective experiences repeatedly outweighed exploratory reward
exploration value weighting followed repeated confirmation and failure signals
maintenance demands kept recurring strongly enough to change long-horizon priorities
plasticity widens only under repeated adaptive evidence and narrows under repeated threat
continuity resilience was shaped by repeated repair versus chronic strain
